title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A video essay exploring how logarithmic functions can transform and analyze images, using Escher's Print Gallery as a central example. The presentation covers conformal maps from complex analysis, the complex exponential and logarithm, and their deeper mathematical foundations for understanding image warping.
